title: Aurora, 61408, Glitzy Tots Labrador Dog 8In, Soft Toy, Brown
features: From Aurora's magical Glitzy Tots collection
Soft and extremely touchable soft toy made with high quality materials
Adorable Golden Brown Labrador Dog Soft Toy wth sparkle accents
Children will love this cute and hugely collectable character
description: Glitzy Tots is Aurora World’s cute and cuddly range of collectable animals. Introducing our gorgeous golden brown Labrador Dog with sparkly golden accents on his feet and nose. He is super soft and cuddly and will make the perfect gift. Aurora World is an industry leader with over 40 years of experience in designing and manufacturing innovative and high quality plush products.
